perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a middle-aged man wearing glasses and a cap, drinking coffee in an airplane business class seat with 'EVA AIR' text overlaid. (2) The camera pans to show the cabin interior, highlighting the 1-2-1 seat layout and a female flight attendant briefly moving in the aisle. (3) Detailed shots follow, demonstrating the high privacy panels, the 193cm lie-flat bed mode, and a hand operating the touch-control seat panel. (4) The sequence then focuses on storage features, including a side cabinet for accessories and a dedicated shoe storage area. (5) The latter half of the video transitions to a food review, showing Din Tai Fung branded dishes: appetizers, steaming xiaolongbao, clear chicken soup, and a dessert soup with wolfberries. (6) The man is seen using chopsticks to eat and reacting positively with facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts and remains constant. A male narrator begins speaking in a friendly, enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) During the seat demonstration, faint electronic motor whirring sounds are heard as the seat adjusts. (3) Subtle clicking sounds occur when the storage cabinet is opened. (4) The narrator's voice becomes more expressive and high-pitched during the food tasting segment. (5) No significant ambient aircraft engine noise is detected, suggesting high-quality recording or post-production filtering.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'EVA AIR 長榮航空 787-10 商務艙' (EVA Air 787-10 Business Class). (2) Decorative Text: '反魚骨 1-2-1 佈局' (Reverse Herringbone 1-2-1 Layout), '高隔板 + 座位傾斜設計' (High Partition + Tilted Seat Design). (3) Functional Text: '全長 193 公分' (Total length 193 cm). (4) Functional Text: '鼎泰豐' (Din Tai Fung) and '經典小籠包' (Classic Xiaolongbao). (5) Hook Text: '台灣味 真的直接帶上天!' (Taiwanese flavor truly taken to the sky!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cabin/Seat Feature Demo -> In-flight Meal Review -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female flight attendant visible in the background for a few seconds.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male creator wearing a white t-shirt, glasses, a beige and brown patterned flat cap, and a wooden bead bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of an EVA Air 787-10 Dreamliner business class cabin, featuring modern grey and brown seating modules, large windows showing blue sky, and integrated infotainment screens.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light from windows combined with soft interior cabin lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Experience Demo -> Detailed Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel experience review, specifically promoting the comfort features and high-quality catering (Din Tai Fung) of EVA Air's 787-10 business class to potential travelers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Frequent display of brand logos and positive verbal commentary on service and food.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing with colorful variety-show style text overlays and a focus on tech-like seat features.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges luxury travel with popular food culture in Taiwan by highlighting the Din Tai Fung collaboration.
